segments: : مَنْ قَرَأَ کُلَّ لَیْلَهٍ أَوْ کُلَّ جُمُعَهٍ سُورَهَ الْأَحْقَافِ لَمْ یُصِبْهُ اللَّهُ بِرَوْعَهٍ فِی الْحَیَاهِ الدُّنْیَا وَ آمَنَهُ مِنْ فَزَعِ یَوْمِ الْقِیَامَهِ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ.
arabic.text: : مَنْ قَرَأَ کُلَّ لَیْلَهٍ أَوْ کُلَّ جُمُعَهٍ سُورَهَ الْأَحْقَافِ لَمْ یُصِبْهُ اللَّهُ بِرَوْعَهٍ فِی الْحَیَاهِ الدُّنْیَا وَ آمَنَهُ مِنْ فَزَعِ یَوْمِ الْقِیَامَهِ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ.

segments: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan b. Sayf b. ’Umayra from Abdillah b. Abi Ya’fur from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: One who recites Surah Ahqaaf every Friday eve or Friday, Allah would keep him away from the troubles in the worldly life, and on the Day of Judgment he would be safe from the painful screams, if Allah wills.
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan b. Sayf b. ’Umayra from Abdillah b. Abi Ya’fur from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: One who recites Surah Ahqaaf every Friday eve or Friday, Allah would keep him away from the troubles in the worldly life, and on the Day of Judgment he would be safe from the painful screams, if Allah wills.

narratorChain.raw: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ سَیْفِ بْنِ عَمِیرَهَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ أَبِی یَعْفُورٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ
